"'''Alone Together'''" is an article in [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 5|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 5]] by [[Bob Woods]] about [[Tim Hildebrandt|Tim]] and [[Greg Hildebrandt]].
